software_trace_widget.goal: surface lane drift and state clearly for operators
software_trace_widget.boundary: terminal-first lane visibility in active ORP sessions
software_trace_widget.constraints: low friction and no GUI dependency
software_trace_widget.success_criteria: operators identify a drifting lane within 10 seconds without overloading the terminal surface

product_project_home.goal: implement the decision to foreground linked projects on the web app home
product_project_home.constraints: keep the home calm and preserve access to the full idea library through Pensieve
product_project_home.success_criteria: users reach active linked work in one click and broad idea browsing remains one step deeper

research_drift_hypothesis.goal: test whether short drift summaries reduce the time needed to identify stalled lanes
research_drift_hypothesis.boundary: terminal-first multi-lane workflows where operators are already monitoring active lanes
research_drift_hypothesis.constraints: matched with-versus-without summary trials and no excessive summary noise
research_drift_hypothesis.success_criteria: the fixture captures detection-time differences clearly enough to support or falsify the hypothesis

research_handoff_experiment.goal: run matched handoff trials across free-form, checklist, and kernel task artifacts
research_handoff_experiment.constraints: small internal sample with a matched prompt set and reviewer score sheet
research_handoff_experiment.success_criteria: pickup scores, clarification counts, and time-to-correct-interpretation are all captured

operations_habanero_checkpoint.goal: confirm active Habanero machines are resynced and a fresh hosted job pickup succeeds
operations_habanero_checkpoint.constraints: avoid stale routing state and duplicate world bindings
operations_habanero_checkpoint.success_criteria: one fresh hosted job is picked up successfully after rerunning runner sync on active machines

operations_runner_policy.goal: enforce the rule that only routeable local sessions can be targeted by hosted claims
operations_runner_policy.boundary: runner sync, poll, and work lifecycle
operations_runner_policy.constraints: do not claim unroutable jobs and keep routing machine-scoped
operations_runner_policy.success_criteria: unroutable jobs are rejected before claim and routeable jobs continue through the normal work lifecycle

writing_kernel_launch_result.goal: run the comparative artifact, pickup, and corpus-fit studies needed after the first kernel launch
writing_kernel_launch_result.constraints: current evidence is strongest on internal validity and comparative superiority is not yet proven
writing_kernel_launch_result.success_criteria: comparative artifact, pickup, and corpus-fit studies are completed and recorded as canonical evidence
